module.name: protocol
module.purpose: Owns shared protocol contracts and namespace re-exports. Direct files define the SessionMessage network envelope and tool metadata models; task IDs/events live in task child modules, ExeId in execution/id.rs, and SessionEvent in session/event.rs with Task, Step, and Execution variants. The task, step, execution, and session child modules own their concrete protocol definitions, while mod.rs is namespace and re-export wiring only.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns task protocol contracts split by concern: TaskId identity, TaskEvent stream variants, TaskRequestBrief, TaskPreview, TaskResult, TaskSignature, and TaskStatus.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns the step protocol: StepKind with Model(ModelStepKind)/Execution(ExecutionStepKind)/User(UserStepKind) sub-kinds (kind.rs), the StepSignature record carrying step_no/name/kind (signature.rs), the StepEvent stream enum whose Complete/Fail variants now carry a StepResult (event.rs), the StepResult content payload (result.rs), the StepStatus lifecycle enum Prepare/Process/Complete/Fail (status.rs), and the StepPreview signature+result record (preview.rs).

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Owns execution protocol contracts split by concern: ExeId identity, ExecutionEvent, ExecutionRequest, ExecutionUpdate, ExecutionSignature, and ExecutionStatus.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns the SessionEvent protocol enum in event.rs with Task, Step, and Execution variants; mod.rs is namespace and re-export wiring only.
